flow.name: employee-details-api-main-flow
flow.doc:name: Employee API Main Flow
flow.doc:description: Main entry point for the Employee Details API. Receives all HTTP requests and routes them via APIKit Router.

http:listener.doc:name: HTTP Listener
http:listener.doc:description: Listens for all inbound HTTP requests on /api/* and delegates routing to the APIKit Router

apikit:router.doc:name: APIKit Router
apikit:router.doc:description: Routes incoming requests to the appropriate implementation flow based on HTTP method and resource path defined in the RAML spec

flow.name: employee-details-api-console-flow
flow.doc:name: Employee API Console Flow
flow.doc:description: Serves the APIKit API Console (interactive API documentation) at /console/*

http:listener.doc:name: HTTP Listener - Console
http:listener.doc:description: Listens for requests to the API Console endpoint at /console/*

apikit:console.doc:name: APIKit Console
apikit:console.doc:description: Renders the interactive API console for the Employee Details API specification
